# Joga Labs

> Joga Labs® is a competitive youth futsal club in Keller / North Fort Worth, Texas, founded by Coach Roberto Avey (former A.A. Ponte Preta junior squad, Brazil). Programs: competitive U9–U15 futsal teams, game-based soccer classes for ages 5–15, and Inspire Labs — a dedicated autism & special-needs soccer program. Training methodology: players learn best by playing the game itself (small-sided, game-based training).

Key facts:
- Phone: (817) 546-5994 · Email: info@jogalab.com
- Indoor venue: Chaos Sports Performance, 5701 Egg Farm Rd, Fort Worth, TX 76244 (Chaos Indoor Futsal League)
- Practice location: 4200 Keller Haslet Rd, Keller, TX 76244
- Two competitive U13 squads: Joga Labs Black and Joga Labs Red
- Inspire Labs (autism soccer) requirements: child understands simple commands, is physically capable, no history of violent behavior; groups form with 2+ kids at the same level; meets once a week, indoors
- Areas served: Keller, North Fort Worth, Haslet, Watauga, Roanoke, Justin, Saginaw, Northlake, Westlake, Trophy Club, Argyle, Colleyville, Arlington (Texas)

## Programs
- [Futsal Teams (Team Labs)](https://jogalab.com/futsal-teams/): Competitive U9–U15 select futsal with a development pathway; tryouts open.
- [Soccer Classes](https://jogalab.com/classes-and-training/): Game-based skill classes for ages 5–15.
- [Autism Soccer (Inspire Labs)](https://jogalab.com/autism-soccer-lessons-keller-north-fort-worth/): Structured, compassionate soccer for neurodiverse athletes built on group play, sharing, teamwork, and exercise.
